purpose: Compute matched log evidence for DEU and native/baseline under the same likelihood family.
mcmc_required: not necessarily; use nested sampler/evidence estimator
must_match: likelihood set, nuisance treatment, data masks, priors/scopes, chain/evidence tolerances
claim_unlocked_if_passes: Bayes-factor/evidence language, still caveated by prior dependence
claim_not_unlocked: physical proof or TT_lite inclusion unless explicitly sampled

purpose: Compute descriptive AIC/BIC/DIC/WAIC-like summaries from matched posterior chains if available.
mcmc_required: already partly available, but estimator validity must be audited
must_match: effective parameter count definition, loglike components, chain quality, posterior weights
claim_not_unlocked: Bayes factor or model superiority by itself

purpose: Assess whether any evidence/comparison result is stable under reasonable prior-width choices.
must_match: prior families for shared parameters and DEU-only beta/p_vis treatment
claim_not_unlocked: final publication claim without external validation

purpose: Run an explicit sampled likelihood configuration including TT_lite if TT_lite posterior language is desired.
mcmc_required: yes, if sampled posterior claims are desired
must_match: TT_lite inclusion on both DEU and native/baseline sides or a justified diagnostic-only design
claim_unlocked_if_passes: TT_lite-included posterior claims for that new run only
claim_not_unlocked: retroactive TT_lite inclusion for current production posterior

purpose: Check whether posterior/model comparison survives a data split or external dataset.
must_match: external data handling, masks, priors, likelihood code, comparison metric
claim_not_unlocked: evidence/Bayes factor unless evidence is computed
